calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Off Calendar

Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.S Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue And Stay Of Proceedings Pending Transfer
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Philip J. Sciranka of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (415-766-3231) appearing for defendant / moving party Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Charles Van Norman and Carol Luckenbach

RULING:
DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND STAY OF PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as revised: Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.'s motion to transfer venue and to stay proceedings pending transfer is granted. Plaintiffs do not oppose the motion. The case is ordered transferred to the Superior Court of California, County of Los Angeles. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Holly Sayers of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13678 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
